mapper.select: SELECT count(b.id) as bindCount, a.id, a.name,a.order, a.remarks,a.create_time as createTime FROM member_tag a LEFT JOIN member_tag_bind b ON a.id = b.member_tag_id WHERE a.delete_flag = 0 GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY a.order

SELECT a.member_tag_id as id, count( * ) as memberCount FROM ( SELECT * FROM member_tag_bind WHERE member_id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM member WHERE mch_id = #{mchId} ) ) a LEFT JOIN member b ON a.member_id = b.user_id WHERE b.mch_id = #{mchId} GROUP BY a.member_tag_id
